title: Copis Warps
description: A Warps Project, You can warp to your signifact public places!
body:
#

Copis Warps

# Features ## Set Warps - Players can create custom warp points with `/setwarp `. - Warp locations are saved with world, coordinates, and orientation. ## Teleportation - `/warp ` teleports the player to a warp after a 5-second countdown. - Teleportation includes portal particles and sound effects. - Prevents teleporting into solid blocks. ## Warp Management - `/delwarp ` deletes a warp. - `/warps` lists all available warp points. ## Persistent Data Storage - Warp data is stored in `config/copis_warps.json` and persists across server restarts. Works on Fabric and compatible plugin servers.
